    sysutils/tmux-xpanes: update to 4.1.4

    Changes:
    - New option: --interval <seconds>
    - Officially support tmux version until 3.3a
    - Officially support bash 5.2
    - Update documents

    Changelog: https://github.com/greymd/tmux-xpanes/releases/tag/v4.1.4

    PR:             270282
